posts.text: BREAKING: President Trump says the US will bomb and destroy one bridge or power plant for every time Iran shoots at a ship in the Strait of Hormuz “from this point forward.” Trump says this includes bridges and power plants next to or in Tehran.
posts.author: KobeissiLetter

posts.text: This should not be a surprise
